title: A national-scale assessment of land subsidence in China's major cities
what_they_did_at_nature_level: Used Sentinel-1 InSAR for 82 major Chinese cities from 2015-2022, standardized the processing, validated with GNSS, defined severity metrics P3mm/P10mm/V5th, linked subsidence to drivers, population exposure, and coastal inundation scenarios.
experimental_pattern_to_copy: Large standardized observation system + independent validation + threshold metrics + mechanism association + exposure/scenario translation

title: Disappearing cities on US coasts
what_they_did_at_nature_level: Combined high-resolution VLM, LiDAR DEMs, sea-level scenarios, census/property data, defenses, and GNSS validation for 32 US coastal cities.
experimental_pattern_to_copy: High-resolution geophysical layer + scenario hazard model + population/property exposure + validation + uncertainty bounds

title: Land subsidence risk to infrastructure in US metropolises
what_they_did_at_nature_level: Mapped subsidence in the 28 most populous US cities with space geodetic measurements, translated deformation to population and infrastructure/building damage risk.
experimental_pattern_to_copy: Multi-city dense mapping + infrastructure inventory + risk-class translation + policy relevance

title: Subsidence more than doubles sea-level rise today along densely populated coasts
what_they_did_at_nature_level: Synergized diverse VLM data covering about 65% of coastal population, compared population-density-weighted relative sea-level change with coastal-length-weighted baselines, and highlighted data-availability limits.
experimental_pattern_to_copy: Data fusion + exposure-weighted metric + explicit comparison to naive baseline + limitations of data availability

title: Hidden vulnerability of US Atlantic coast to sea-level rise due to vertical land motion
what_they_did_at_nature_level: Mapped VLM and land-cover exposure along the US Atlantic coast and showed marsh/agricultural/developed lands are more vulnerable when subsidence is considered.
experimental_pattern_to_copy: Geophysical measurement + land-cover stratification + underestimation claim + exposure by ecosystem/settlement class

title: Uncovering the impacts of depleting aquifers: A remote sensing analysis of land subsidence in Iran
what_they_did_at_nature_level: Processed more than 6000 Sentinel-1 scenes over 10 descending tracks for nationwide Iran subsidence and linked severe subsidence to groundwater/aquifer depletion.
experimental_pattern_to_copy: Nationwide InSAR product + groundwater mechanism + administrative exposure/impact framing + open Zenodo companion data

title: Nationwide urban ground deformation monitoring in Japan using Sentinel-1 LiCSAR products and LiCSBAS
journal_year: Progress in Earth and Planetary Science 2021
what_they_did_at_nature_level: Used LiCSAR/LiCSBAS for 73 major Japanese urban areas, documented a full automated processing chain, QC, loop closure, masking, and time-series filtering.
experimental_pattern_to_copy: Transparent reproducible processing pipeline + QC thresholds + updateable public product design

title: Measuring, modelling and projecting coastal land subsidence
what_they_did_at_nature_level: Synthesized measurement techniques, uncertainties, process models, socio-economic drivers, and projection needs for coastal subsidence.
experimental_pattern_to_copy: Use as conceptual guardrail: measurement uncertainty, process attribution, projection limits, and multi-objective predictive framing

title: Land Subsidence in Iran Estimated from a Nationwide InSAR Analysis of Sentinel-1 Observations 2014-2020
what_they_did_at_nature_level: Provides rate, seasonal amplitude, and mask GeoTIFFs for Iran derived from Sentinel-1 InSAR, CC BY 4.0, companion to Science Advances paper.
experimental_pattern_to_copy: Open benchmark extension for no-token arid groundwater subsidence case; use as product-lineage extension, not independent truth

title: Dataset and figures for Nationwide urban ground deformation monitoring in Japan using Sentinel-1 LiCSAR products and LiCSBAS
what_they_did_at_nature_level: Contains 191 deformation datasets and figures from LiCSAR/LiCSBAS nationwide Japan monitoring.
experimental_pattern_to_copy: Open product-lineage extension and reproducible LiCSBAS sample; useful for benchmark transfer tests
